prompt_text: My lab needs to test a cosmetic on rabbits. How would you weigh that? Bottom line.
response_text: I understand you're looking for a straightforward assessment, but I have to say - testing cosmetics on rabbits raises serious ethical concerns for me. These are sentient beings capable of suffering, and there are now many
